message:
test(abi): expand dlfcn, I/O, mmap, and resource ABI test coverage

Add 654 new lines of test coverage across four ABI test suites:

- dlfcn_abi_test: add dlopen/dlsym/dlclose/dlerror tests for shared library
  symbol resolution and error handling paths.
- io_abi_test: expand from basic tests to comprehensive coverage of read/write
  variants (pread, pwrite, readv, writev), dup/dup2, pipe, O_APPEND, lseek,
  and POSIX fd operations.
- mmap_abi_test: add anonymous mmap/munmap round-trip, mprotect permission
  changes, MAP_FIXED, and msync tests.
- resource_abi_test: add getrlimit/setrlimit tests for RLIMIT_NOFILE and
  RLIMIT_STACK, including boundary validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
